creator: david@catwhisker.org
text:
On Sun, Jun 23, 2013 at 11:02:58AM +0200, John Marino wrote:
> Please time this ticket 10-month old ticket out, the maintainer is again 
> non-responsive.
> 
> While ical apparently built with tcl 85 but malfuncted, it doesn't even 
> build with tcl86.  Somebody should also mark this port broken 
> immediately.

Please note that r295088:

r295088 | obrien | 2012-04-18 21:22:14 -0700 (Wed, 18 Apr 2012) | 7 lines

addressed the issue as far as ability to use deskutils/ical with tcl/Tk
8.5.  (The maintainer had asked me to test it, which I was happy to have
done.)

If there are issues with tcl/Tk 8.6, those should be addressed in a
different PR; I believe that this PR should be closed as resolved.

Peace,
david
-- 
David H. Wolfskill				david@catwhisker.org
Taliban: Evil men with guns afraid of truth from a 14-year old girl.

See http://www.catwhisker.org/~david/publickey.gpg for my public key.
